weather.summary: Saturday: 10°C, few clouds. Sunday: 10°C, broken clouds

metadata.greeting: This weekend is packed with exciting opportunities for your 3-year-old! From farm animals and Easter egg hunts to interactive museum exhibits and creative play, there's something for everyone in Hackney and beyond. I've found some great free options too, so you can explore without breaking the bank!

activities.title: Library Club at the Hackney Showroom
activities.description: Reading corner and diverse book-pairing service. Great for all ages.
activities.whyItWorks: A relaxed, free space to explore books and stories. Good for a wide age range.

transport.fromHackney: Various bus routes and Overground to Hackney Downs.
transport.tip: Check term times before you go!

activities.title: Young V&A
activities.description: Museum of childhood with collections of toys, games, clothing and furniture.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive exhibits and plenty of space to explore. Perfect for sparking curiosity.

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Bethnal Green, then a short walk.
transport.tip: Check for special events and workshops on their website.

activities.title: Vauxhall City Farm Easter Activities
activities.description: Free Easter hunts and bonnet-making crafts at the farm.
activities.whyItWorks: Animals, crafts, and outdoor fun all in one place!

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Highbury & Islington, then Victoria line to Vauxhall.
transport.tip: Check the website for specific times of activities.

activities.title: Hackney City Farm
activities.description: Meet farmyard animals and learn about sustainable living.
activities.whyItWorks: Close to home and perfect for a quick visit. Animals are always a hit!

transport.fromHackney: Walk, cycle, or take a local bus.
transport.tip: Check for feeding times for a more interactive experience.

activities.title: Walthamstow Wetlands
activities.description: Explore nature trails and spot wildlife in this urban nature reserve.
activities.whyItWorks: Plenty of space to run around and explore. Great for bird watching.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Walthamstow Central, then a short walk.
transport.tip: Bring binoculars for better wildlife spotting!

activities.title: Queen's Yard Summer Party 2026
activities.description: Multi-venue event
activities.whyItWorks: Fun for everyone

transport.fromHackney: Bus and Overground.
transport.tip: Check age suitability.

activities.title: Inside Aardman: Wallace & Gromit and Friends at Young V&A
activities.description: Explore how the iconic characters from Aardman are brought to life. Ticket gives unlimited visits.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive exhibits and animation fun.

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Bethnal Green, then a short walk.
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance.

activities.title: Sound Explorers at Young V&A
activities.description: Interactive music session
activities.whyItWorks: For young children to experience sounds.

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Bethnal Green, then a short walk.
transport.tip: Check website for details

activities.title: Zoonormous Egg Hunt at London Zoo
activities.description: Search for giant Easter eggs hidden around the zoo.
activities.whyItWorks: Animals and an egg hunt! What could be better?

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Highbury & Islington, then Victoria Line to Euston, then Northern Line to Camden Town, then a short walk.
transport.tip: Book tickets online in advance to save money.

activities.title: Natural History Museum
activities.description: Explore dinosaurs, mammals, and other fascinating creatures.
activities.whyItWorks: Dinosaurs are always a hit! Plus, it's free!

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Highbury & Islington, then Victoria Line to South Kensington.
transport.tip: Visit during off-peak hours to avoid crowds.

activities.title: Science Museum
activities.description: Discover how the world works through interactive exhibits.
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on fun for curious minds.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Highbury & Islington, then Victoria Line to South Kensington.
transport.tip: Check for special events and shows on their website.

activities.title: V&A Museum of Childhood
activities.description: Explore historic toys, games, and childhood memorabilia.
activities.whyItWorks: Nostalgic fun for parents and engaging for kids.

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Bethnal Green, then a short walk
transport.tip: Great for a nostalgic trip down memory lane for parents too!

activities.title: Battersea Park
activities.description: Enjoy gardens, playgrounds, a boating lake, and a mini zoo.
activities.whyItWorks: Plenty of space to run around and outdoor activities.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Clapham Junction, then a short bus ride.
transport.tip: Pack a picnic to enjoy by the lake.

activities.title: Southbank Centre
activities.description: A hub of arts, fun, and food with free events and performances.
activities.whyItWorks: Lots to see and do, with something for every age.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Highbury & Islington, then Victoria Line to Embankment, then a short walk.
transport.tip: Check their website for a full list of events.

activities.title: Diana Memorial Playground
activities.description: A large playground inspired by Peter Pan.
activities.whyItWorks: A fantastic, themed playground that will spark their imagination!

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Notting Hill Gate, then a short walk through Kensington Gardens.
transport.tip: Can get busy, so try to arrive early.

activities.title: Horniman Museum and Gardens
activities.description: Explore natural history, musical instruments, and beautiful gardens.
activities.whyItWorks: Eclectic collection with something for everyone. Gardens are great for running around.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Forest Hill.
transport.tip: Check out the farmers' market on Sundays!

activities.title: Micro to Macro! at Young V&A
activities.description: Family activity
activities.whyItWorks: Fun for all

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Bethnal Green, then a short walk.
transport.tip: Book ahead.

activities.title: The Lion Inside
activities.description: A theatre show aimed at 3-7 year olds based on the book.
activities.whyItWorks: A gentle introduction to theatre.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then bus to Southwark.
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance.

activities.title: Easter Family Festival at the Natural History Museum
activities.description: Free family-friendly activities.
activities.whyItWorks: Free and family friendly.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Highbury & Islington, then Victoria Line to South Kensington.
transport.tip: Check the website for specific activities and times.

activities.title: Tower Bridge Easter Family Activities
activities.description: Making, movement and mechanical marvels, discover how Victorian engineers and inventors shaped the modern world.
activities.whyItWorks: Designed for curious minds and energetic explorers.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Whitechapel then the District Line to Tower Hill.
transport.tip: Drop-in throughout the day.

activities.title: Family Design Challenge at Young V&A
activities.description: Hands on design challenge for all the family.
activities.whyItWorks: Fun for all

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Bethnal Green, then a short walk.
transport.tip: Book ahead.

activities.title: Design Baby: Play Build Play at V&A South Kensington
activities.description: Workshop.
activities.whyItWorks: Play, build and play!

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Highbury & Islington, then Victoria Line to South Kensington.
transport.tip: Book ahead.

activities.title: Spring Family Fun at the Southbank Centre
activities.description: A festival of fun and creativity for families includes super shows, musical adventures, amazing puppetry and lots of free fun in the Easter break.
activities.whyItWorks: Loads of activities.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Highbury & Islington, then Victoria Line to Embankment, then a short walk.
transport.tip: Check their website for a full list of events.

activities.title: REPLAY: A Limitless Recycled Playground
activities.description: Explore a world of play and invention in a recycled playground for children and their grown-ups.
activities.whyItWorks: Lots of activities.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Highbury & Islington, then Victoria Line to Embankment, then a short walk.
transport.tip: Book online
